changes.note: Q1 beat: +53% revenue, +63% EPS, backlog $2.6B (3x prior year), orders +40%. Raised full-year to 26-28% growth. Re-rating underway but estimates rising faster than price.
Q1 beat: revenue $1.68B. AI packaging portfolio to TRIPLE in 2026. $2.5-3B capex plan. Arizona facility ramp H2 2026. Lagging supplier pattern forming.
Backlog updated $44B → $48.5B. EPS guidance raised above analyst avg ($13.55-$14.25 vs $13.09). Thesis sustained.
